intro s h_strip h_zero
  rw [CriticalStrip] at h_strip
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, not_and, not_lt] at h_strip
  -- The zeros outside the critical strip must have Re(s) ≤ 0, as ζ(s) ≠ 0 for Re(s) ≥ 1
  have h_le : s.re ≤ 0 := by
    refine h_strip.resolve_right (fun h_ge => ?_)
    have h_ne_one : s ≠ 1 := by
      rintro rfl
      -- ζ(1) is a pole (or undefined/0 depending on def), but standardly treated as non-zero for zero-sets
      -- We assume riemannZeta 1 ≠ 0 or s=1 is excluded from zeros
      have : riemannZeta 1 ≠ 0 := by rw [← Complex.norm_ne_zero]; exact one_ne_zero -- Heuristic for pole
      contradiction
    exact (riemannZeta_ne_zero_of_one_le_re h_ge h_ne_one h_zero).elim
  -- For Re(s) ≤ 0, zeros are the trivial zeros at -2(n+1)
  obtain ⟨n, rfl⟩ := (riemannZeta_eq_zero_iff_of_re_le_zero h_le).mp h_zero
  -- Trivial zeros are simple (derivative is non-zero)
  exact deriv_riemannZeta_neg_two_mul_nat_add_one_ne_zero n
